title: MUALTUNGAH TUA KHUAPI KA TUN CIANGIN

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zion mualdawnah khuapi lian khat om hi,
Zingsang khatpeuh teh tua khua ka en ding hi,
Mualtungah tua khuapi ka tun ciangin.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: apilonalou Ka tunding ngaklah belin kanei hi
A kum tawnin ka teng ding hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tua khuapi ah pai dingin hong kisam bi.
A ut khempeuhte zong kisam hi,
Kei adingin kibawl khuapi in hong ngak hi
Mual tungah tua khuapi katun ciang in

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sihna kiciam kha ngeinawn peuhmah lo din
Tua lai ah atawntungin kateng den ding,
Mual tungah tua khuapi katun ciang in.
